videos.headline: Gabriel finds Smith for another Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Oklahoma QB Dillon Gabriel tosses to an open Blake Smith for a short touchdown in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gabriel finds Smith for another Oklahoma TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel's TD pass opens the scoring for Oklahoma
videos.description: Oklahoma QB Dillon Gabriel tosses to an open Andrel Anthony for a 29-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel's TD pass opens the scoring for Oklahoma) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: SMU O-lineman catches TD in the 4th
videos.description: SMU QB Preston Stone lobs it to his OL Stone Eby in the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (SMU O-lineman catches TD in the 4th) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalil Farooq shakes off a tackle for an Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Oklahoma QB Dillon Gabriel tosses it to Jalil Farooq, who sheds a tackle en route to a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalil Farooq shakes off a tackle for an Oklahoma TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marcus Major makes a nice move for another Sooners TD
videos.description: Oklahoma RB Marcus Major makes a nice move to evade a tackle and sprints his way for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marcus Major makes a nice move for another Sooners TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
